title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 305.330 - Property of authority exempt from state taxes
text:
305.330.  Property of authority exempt from state taxes. — All property, real, personal or mixed, owned by the authority, which is located in the state of Missouri, is exempt from taxation under the laws of the state of Missouri.
(L. 1985 S.B. 145 & 166 § 10)
